# PERF-186 negative: strings.IndexByte walks whitespace and slices in place
lang: go
file: PERF-186-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "strings"

func Tokens(s string) []string {
	out := make([]string, 0, 8)
	start := 0
	for i := 0; i < len(s); i++ {
		if s[i] == ' ' || s[i] == '\t' {
			if start < i {
				out = append(out, s[start:i])
			}
			start = i + 1
		}
	}
	if start < len(s) {
		out = append(out, s[start:])
	}
	return out
}

var _ = strings.IndexByte
